theme_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
theme_archetype.description: Objective, rigid, and function-first. High contrast is mandatory to ensure readability on large conference projector screens and clear usability for the speaker on mobile devices in dark or dim event halls.

rules: NO Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Headings and Italian Projected Text: Cabinet Grotesk or Outfit (Bold, tight tracking).
Portuguese Original Text / Transcripts: JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono.
Mobile App UI Body: Manrope or IBM Plex Sans.

scale.mono_caption: text-sm sm:text-base font-mono tracking-widest uppercase text-zinc-500

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard. Generous spacing (p-8 to p-12) for mobile controls, extreme padding (p-16 to p-32) for projection to avoid edge distortion.

projector_view.layout: h-screen w-full flex flex-col justify-between p-12 lg:p-24 overflow-hidden bg-[#050505]

speaker_view.header: glassmorphism sticky top-0 z-50 p-6 border-b border-white/10
speaker_view.control_bento: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-6 bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/90 to-transparent pt-12

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold py-4 px-8 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.record_fab: w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl transition-all
buttons.record_fab_active: w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-red-600 border border-red-500 flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,51,51,0.4)] animate-pulse

motion.scrolling: Use lenis for smooth scrolling on web/projector view.
motion.text_reveal: New Italian translation blocks should fade in and slide up slightly (translate-y-4 to 0) to avoid jarring pops on the big screen.
motion.recording_state: Pulsing red glow on the mic button and dynamic scaling of waveform bars based on audio input.

icons.style: Sharp, technical, no rounded edges if possible. Use standard stroke-width 1.5.

hero_abstract_waveform.description: Abstract minimalist sound wave visualization. Perfect for landing page hero background or session join screen.

event_projection_bg.description: Massive dark conference stage projector screen. Use for marketing features or 'how it works' section.

speaker_1.description: Speaker on stage. Good for testimonials or demo screen profile pictures.

speaker_2.description: Speaker in suit on stage. Use for demo mockups.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a dark-theme only application. Do not implement a light theme.
Use standard React JS and Tailwind CSS. The app needs to support both mobile (speaker view) and desktop (projector view).
Use Framer Motion to smoothly animate the incoming text on the projector view.
For the Projector View: Hide scrollbars entirely. Content should auto-scroll smoothly as new text arrives.
For the Speaker View: The microphone control button must be huge, easily tappable without looking, and clearly indicate LIVE status (Red glow).
Ensure all text rendering on the projector screen uses font-bold and tracking-tighter for maximum legibility from a distance.
Implement data-testid attributes on all interactive elements: e.g., data-testid='mic-record-button', data-testid='session-join-button'.
